data.body: f088: authored 12-test held-out suite (all RED via NotImplementedError stub), held out edge/E2E to $JOB/tmp/held_out, left 2 happy-path tests; dispatched implementer subagent for scripts/check_docs_index.py (script only; I wire CI gate after validation). e866 remediated round3 (exact backtick-match proof, INTERCEPT_COMMANDS drift proof vs _cli ladder, subprocess robustness, CI-wired AC). 235a PASS (its critical advisories re independent classification oracle will be satisfied by my held-out test suite, not plan churn). b5a4 PASS. Re-reviewing e866.
